description.en: Return a digest object that has been updated with contents of file object. fileobj must be a file-like object opened for reading in binary mode. It accepts file objects from builtin open(), BytesIO instances, SocketIO objects from socket.socket.makefile(), and similar. fileobj must be opened in blocking mode, otherwise a BlockingIOError may be raised. The function may bypass Python’s I/O and use the file descriptor from fileno() directly. fileobj must be assumed to be in an unknown state afte...
